name: io.github.oaslananka/health-monitor-mcp
title: MCP Health Monitor
description: Monitor MCP, CI, and HTTP targets with health history, TLS expiry, assertions, and diagnostics

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_DB
environmentVariables.description: Custom path for the SQLite database

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_AUTO_CHECK
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable background scheduled checks

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_RETENTION_DAYS
environmentVariables.description: Number of days to retain health check history

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_MAX_CONCURRENCY
environmentVariables.description: Maximum concurrent scheduled and interactive server checks

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub token with Actions read access for private repositories and higher API rate limits

environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional GitLab token with read access to private projects, pipelines, jobs, and traces

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_GITLAB_BASE_URL_ALLOWLIST
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated self-hosted GitLab HTTPS origins allowed for monitoring

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_HTTP_TARGET_ALLOWLIST
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated private HTTP(S) origins allowed only in the full runtime profile
